auth.signInDescription: Enter your credentials to start your Rudix session. Protected routes will return you here when authentication is required.
auth.signOutDescription: End your current session on this device.
auth.signOutAllDevicesDescription: Revoke all active sessions and sign out everywhere.
auth.ssoDescription: Your organization uses single sign-on. Continue below or sign in with SSO.
auth.passwordResetNotConfigured: Password reset is not configured yet. Contact your administrator for account recovery.
auth.ssoNotConfigured: Single sign-on is configured but no start URL is available.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
auth.insufficientRole: You do not have the required role to access this resource.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters

hero.title: Ask your documents.
hero.description: Turn PDFs, DOCX, and complex technical manuals into precise AI assistants with full citations and infrastructure-level visibility.
hero.imageAlt: Rudix product interface showing document retrieval and grounded answers

problems.heading: Your team has the answers. They are just buried.
problems.description: Siloed knowledge and messy documentation are the hidden taxes on your productivity.
problems.manualSearchingDesc: Hours wasted digging through scattered PDFs, Sharepoint, and old wikis for a single truth.
problems.repeatedQuestionsDesc: Subject matter experts answering the same "How do I..." questions over and over.
problems.untrustedAIDesc: Generic LLMs hallucinating answers without citations or context-specific guardrails.
problems.knowledgeSilosDesc: Critical data trapped in departmental silos, unreachable for cross-functional teams.

workflow.heading: Upload. Ask. Verify.
workflow.ingestionDesc: Rudix automatically parses PDFs, Word, and JSON, converting them into searchable high-dimensional vector embeddings.
workflow.retrievalDesc: When a user asks a question, our RAG engine retrieves the exact chunks needed to answer it, no more and no less.
workflow.generationDesc: The AI answers only based on retrieved data, providing direct links to sources for absolute transparency.

useCases.heading: Built for every team.
useCases.description: Specific solutions for complex enterprise knowledge.
useCases.legalDesc: Review thousands of contracts in seconds with exact clause citations.
useCases.supportTitle: "What is the policy for international returns?"
useCases.supportDesc: Empower agents with instant, accurate answers from latest handbooks.
useCases.engineeringTitle: "What are the API rate limits for Tier 2?"
useCases.engineeringDesc: Surface technical specs and architectural limits directly to developers.
useCases.hrTitle: "How many days of bereavement leave is allowed?"
useCases.hrDesc: Automate employee queries with policy-aligned responses.
useCases.salesOpsTitle: "Do we support SSO for Enterprise clients?"
useCases.salesOpsDesc: Get immediate answers for RFPs and security questionnaires.

security.heading: Designed for private document workflows.
security.description: We do not just secure your data. We architect it for total isolation and auditability.
security.dataIsolationDesc: Separate vector databases for every workspace. Your documents never mix with others.
security.auditLogsDesc: Track every query, retrieval, and administrative action with detailed time-stamped logs.
security.encryptionDesc: AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit, with Bring Your Own Key support for enterprise.

cta.heading: Ready to turn your documents into an AI assistant?
cta.description: Join forward-thinking engineering teams using Rudix for knowledge excellence.

hero.title: The Infrastructure for High-Fidelity Document Intelligence
hero.description: Rudix orchestrates document ingestion, retrieval, grounded answers, and evaluation into one production-ready workflow for enterprise teams.
hero.imageCaption: Product UI preview with ingestion, retrieval, and answer trace visibility.

documentsSection.heading: Precision Document Management
documentsSection.description: Handle high-volume document operations with structured ingestion status, reliable metadata, and clear traceability for each indexed asset.
documentsSection.feature1: Smart parsing across mixed document layouts and formats.
documentsSection.feature2: Reliable re-indexing workflows for updated policy and knowledge documents.
documentsSection.sourceTransparencyText: Citation markers connect each answer to original source snippets, giving reviewers an audit-friendly path from response to supporting evidence.

groundedAnswers.heading: Grounded Answers with Citations
groundedAnswers.description: Every response is tied to supporting evidence so teams can verify claims and inspect referenced snippets with confidence.

pipeline.heading: Pipeline Explorer Visualizer
pipeline.description: Trace ingestion, retrieval, and answer stages in one timeline so teams can debug behavior and improve quality with confidence.
pipeline.imageAlt: Pipeline dashboard preview with retrieval and latency signals

admin.heading: Unified Admin Control
admin.description: Keep governance and operations aligned with built-in observability for usage, policy, and health trends.
admin.soc2Desc: Apply governance-ready controls across documents, chat, and evaluation operations.
admin.usageAnalyticsDesc: Track token usage, latency, and adoption trends for operational planning.

integration.apiFirstDesc: Adopt Rudix in phases with typed interfaces that fit existing workflows and delivery processes.
integration.futureReadyDesc: Plan for controlled connector and MCP expansion without changing core document governance.
integration.operatorVisibilityDesc: Keep pipeline health and quality metrics in one view for faster incident response and tuning.

cta.heading: Ready to architect your data engine?

faq.title: Product FAQ
faq.fileTypesQ: Which file types can we upload?
faq.fileTypesA: Rudix supports PDF, DOCX, and TXT uploads with organization-scoped processing controls.
faq.citationsA: Yes. Rudix returns answer references so teams can inspect source evidence and answer grounding.
faq.evaluationQ: Can we evaluate answer quality before rollout?
faq.evaluationA: Yes. Evaluation runs provide repeatable quality checks for retrieval and final answer behavior.
faq.isolationQ: How does Rudix support data isolation?
faq.isolationA: Rudix enforces organization-level boundaries across documents, retrieval, and user-facing workflows.
faq.deploymentQ: Can we deploy Rudix in our own environment?
faq.deploymentA: Rudix is designed for container-based deployment with environment-driven configuration and operations.

hero.heading: Choose a plan for trusted document AI operations
hero.description: Compare tiers for document ingestion, RAG chat, evaluations, and governance so you can adopt Rudix at the right pace.

plans.heading: Plans for every rollout stage
plans.description: Prices are intentionally shown as contact placeholders until final packaging is approved for your environment and usage profile.
plans.starterSummary: Launch a secure proof of value for one team with core document Q&A workflows.
plans.starterBillingHint: Commercial packaging is finalized during solution review.
plans.starterH0: Core document ingestion and citation-backed chat
plans.teamSummary: Scale across departments with stronger governance, evaluations, and operational controls.
plans.teamBillingHint: Packaging is tailored to usage shape and team requirements.
plans.teamH0: Expanded document, storage, and indexing allowances
plans.teamH1: Evaluation runs and quality tracking workflows
plans.enterpriseSummary: Align private deployment, security review, and governance requirements for regulated or high-scale environments.
plans.enterpriseBillingHint: Final terms depend on deployment, controls, and support model.
plans.enterpriseH0: Private deployment and environment control options
plans.enterpriseH1: Advanced governance policies and approval flows
plans.enterpriseH2: Custom onboarding, success planning, and support
plans.enterpriseH3: Security review workflow with solution architects

usageLimits.heading: Usage and limit guidance
usageLimits.description: Final limits depend on your selected tier and rollout profile across documents, questions, evaluations, indexing workloads, storage, and organization scale.
usageLimits.documentsDetail: Limits can be tuned by tier for ingestion throughput, queued jobs, and index freshness operations.
usageLimits.questionsDetail: Usage controls include chat/question volume, token budgets, and evaluation run allocation.
usageLimits.storageDetail: Tiers can map to storage envelopes, team-member allowances, and organization-level governance needs.

comparison.heading: Plan comparison
comparison.description: Compare capabilities at a glance. Mobile view uses stacked cards for readability.

faq.title: Pricing FAQ
faq.trialQ: Can we start with a trial before committing to a plan?
faq.trialA: Yes. Teams can begin with a trial workflow and then move to the tier that best fits rollout scope and governance needs.
faq.upgradesQ: How do upgrades work when our usage grows?
faq.upgradesA: Rudix supports staged expansion so you can increase usage, controls, and support without rebuilding your document workflows.
faq.securityReviewQ: Can we request a security review during pricing discussions?
faq.securityReviewA: Yes. Security-review discussions can be included during plan selection, especially for private deployment or regulated requirements.
faq.selfHostedQ: Do you support self-hosted or private deployment models?
faq.selfHostedA: Private deployment options are available through enterprise packaging based on infrastructure and governance requirements.
faq.billingQ: Who should we contact for billing and commercial questions?
faq.billingA: Use the Contact Sales path on this page and the Rudix team will route you to the right commercial contact.

cta.heading: Need a tailored plan?
cta.description: Talk with the Rudix team to align usage limits, deployment posture, and support coverage with your rollout.

hero.heading: Security and governance for private document AI
hero.description: Rudix is built for regulated environments and enterprise security teams who need architectural boundaries, auditability, and data-handling controls.

pillars.heading: Security pillars
pillars.description: Core architectural controls that protect documents, access, and operations.
pillars.documentPrivacyDesc: Documents are handled inside organization-scoped workflows with protected storage and controlled retrieval paths.
pillars.orgIsolationDesc: Data access stays tenant-aware so teams only retrieve content from the organization they belong to.
pillars.accessControlDesc: Role-aware permissions are enforced across document actions, retrieval operations, and admin surfaces.
pillars.auditLogsDesc: Security-relevant actions can be tracked with request context to support operational reviews and investigations.
pillars.safeUploadsDesc: Uploads are validated before processing to reduce malformed payload risks and protect ingestion quality.
pillars.encryptionDesc: Rudix is designed for encrypted transport and encrypted storage aligned to enterprise deployment controls.
pillars.encryptionCallout: Encrypted in transit and at rest
pillars.observabilityDesc: Teams can monitor request health and failures with safe telemetry that avoids exposing sensitive document text.

documentHandling.heading: Document handling lifecycle
documentHandling.description: Safe processing from upload to indexed state.
documentHandling.validateDesc: Check file type and structure before processing begins.
documentHandling.storeDesc: Write accepted files to protected object storage.
documentHandling.parseDesc: Extract structured text and metadata safely.
documentHandling.indexDesc: Publish scoped vectors to the organization index.
documentHandling.answerDesc: Return responses grounded in source references.
documentHandling.deleteDesc: Honor deletion workflows across storage and indices.
documentHandling.reindexDesc: Rebuild index state when content is updated.

accessGovernance.heading: Access and governance
accessGovernance.description: Role-scoped controls, session safety, and administrative visibility.
accessGovernance.authSessionDesc: Authenticated flows are separated from public pages, with session checks and protected-route boundaries.
accessGovernance.roleAccessDesc: Permissions can be scoped by role and organization context to control document and admin actions.
accessGovernance.adminGovernanceDesc: Administrative controls support policy management, tooling guardrails, and operational review workflows.
accessGovernance.routeBoundariesDesc: Marketing routes remain public while application workspaces require authenticated access.

compliance.heading: Compliance readiness
compliance.description: Rudix is designed for environments with formal security and retention requirements.
compliance.readiness0: Security documentation and control mappings can be shared during enterprise review.
compliance.readiness1: Readiness for SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA, or ISO workflows depends on your deployment controls and validation process.
compliance.readiness2: Rudix does not claim certifications for your organization unless verified in your environment.
compliance.retention0: Retention timelines should be defined by your organization policy and legal requirements.
compliance.retention1: Deletion workflows should cover object storage, searchable indices, and derived artifacts.
compliance.retention2: Re-index workflows support stale-document refresh and policy updates.

faq.title: Security FAQ
faq.logsQ: Does Rudix expose raw document text in logs by default?
faq.logsA: Rudix is designed for safe observability and avoids exposing raw protected document text in default operational logs.
faq.privateQ: Can we keep Rudix in a private deployment model?
faq.privateA: Yes. Rudix supports deployment patterns where infrastructure and data handling stay inside your controlled environment.
faq.isolationA: Access checks and retrieval filters are organization-scoped so data stays separated across tenants.
faq.reviewQ: Can we review security controls before rollout?
faq.reviewA: Yes. Use a security review session to validate architecture, access controls, and data-handling requirements for your use case.

cta.heading: Request a security review
cta.description: Discuss deployment boundaries, data-handling expectations, and governance requirements with the Rudix team.

hero.heading: Speak with us about your document workflow
hero.description: Book a demo or contact Rudix to discuss secure ingestion, retrieval, evaluation, and governance requirements for your team.

form.title: Request a Demo
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your use case, deployment requirements, or questions
form.successDescription: Thank you for your interest. The Rudix team will be in touch shortly.
form.error: Submission failed. Please try again or use an alternative contact below.

goodFit.heading: Good fit for teams that need
goodFit.item0: Sub-second latency for retrieval-backed Q&A at scale.
goodFit.item1: Security and privacy guardrails for sensitive document workflows.
goodFit.item2: Flexible deployment posture for enterprise governance requirements.
goodFit.item3: Integration planning aligned with existing delivery operations.

cards.salesDesc: Discuss rollout plans, packaging, and enterprise adoption milestones.
cards.supportDesc: Get setup guidance, onboarding support, and operational best practices.
cards.securityDesc: Coordinate security and trust review requests with the Rudix team.
cards.statusDesc: Review platform status and implementation documentation anytime.

faq.title: Contact and demo FAQ
faq.demoQ: Can we request a demo before finalizing packaging?
faq.demoA: Yes. The Rudix team can run a guided demo aligned to your document workflow and rollout goals.
faq.securityQ: Do you support security review requests?
faq.securityA: Yes. You can route security review questions through this page and coordinate next steps with the team.
faq.schedulingQ: Can we use a scheduling link instead of a direct API submission?
faq.schedulingA: Yes. When configured, the contact flow can route to a scheduling or CRM destination.
faq.fallbackQ: What happens if contact submission is not configured?
faq.fallbackA: The page provides fallback contact options so visitors can still reach sales, support, and security contacts.

cta.heading: Need a live walkthrough?
cta.description: Schedule a demo with Rudix to review your use case, success criteria, and rollout path.

hero.heading: AI document Q&A for every team.
hero.description: Rudix helps each department move from fragmented documents to searchable, citation-backed answers with workflow visibility, quality controls, and governance-ready operations.

cards.heading: Enterprise Use Cases
cards.description: Department-specific solution paths built on one shared Rudix foundation.

crossValue.heading: Shared value across all solutions
crossValue.description: Every department benefits from the same secure, grounded, and auditable Rudix platform.
crossValue.secureUploadDesc: Bring departmental files into policy-aware workflows with traceable processing states.
crossValue.citationBackedDesc: Ground answers in source references so teams can verify evidence and context quickly.
crossValue.evaluationQualityDesc: Use repeatable evaluation runs to monitor retrieval and answer performance over time.
crossValue.governanceDesc: Apply role-scoped controls with operational visibility across document and answer workflows.

questionMatrix.heading: Example Question Matrix
questionMatrix.description: See how Rudix handles multi-hop and high-density queries.
questionMatrix.singleHopQuery: "What is our policy on remote work in Germany?"
questionMatrix.multiHopQuery: "Compare our Q3 revenue growth with the projection in the 2022 annual report."
questionMatrix.structuralQuery: "List all vendors with contracts expiring before Dec 31 in a table."
questionMatrix.reasoningQuery: "Does the new GDPR amendment conflict with our current data storage flow?"

workflowStrip.title: From scattered documents to trusted answers
workflowStrip.description: Use a consistent delivery model that supports onboarding, quality assurance, and long-term reliability for department-specific use cases.

cta.heading: Map your team's workflow
cta.description: See the right Rudix solution path for your department and align on a rollout plan.

hero.heading: HR answers from your actual policies.
hero.description: Help employees find answers from handbooks, benefits guides, leave policies, onboarding documents, and internal HR processes with surgical precision.
hero.q0: What is the parental leave policy by region?
hero.q1: Which onboarding documents are required before day one?
hero.q2: What is the remote work reimbursement limit?
hero.engineAnswer: You are eligible for 16 weeks of fully paid leave…

problems.heading: HR teams answer the same questions every week.
problems.description: Manual triage is the bottleneck of scaling enterprise culture. Stop being a search engine for your own documents.
problems.repeatedQuestionsBody: Employees ask the same questions daily, draining bandwidth from strategic HR initiatives.
problems.hardToSearchBody: Static PDFs and messy intranet pages make finding the one true answer nearly impossible for staff.
problems.accuracyGapsBody: Outdated documents lead to conflicting information. Rudix ensures answers come from current versions.

flow.heading: Policy infrastructure flow
flow.description: How Rudix transforms HR documents into grounded answers.
flow.uploadDesc: Securely ingest PDFs, DOCX, or text files into the Rudix workspace.
flow.indexDesc: Advanced RAG architecture breaks text into semantic vector embeddings for precise retrieval.
flow.askDesc: Staff query the assistant in plain language from any interface.
flow.answerDesc: Rudix provides grounded answers with verbatim citations from the source document.
flow.answerExample: "You are eligible for 16 weeks… [Leave Policy p. 14]"

documentSources.heading: Supported document sources
documentSources.description: Whether it's a 200-page handbook or a one-page memo, Rudix processes every nuance of your organizational knowledge.
documentSources.q1: "How many days of sick leave per month?"
documentSources.a1: Employees accrue 1.5 sick days per month up to 18 days per year.
documentSources.q2: "What is the remote work expense limit?"
documentSources.a2: Up to $75/month for home-office expenses with manager approval.

exampleQuestions.heading: Instant clarity for every query.
exampleQuestions.parentalLeaveQ: What is the parental leave policy?
exampleQuestions.parentalLeaveA: Our policy provides 16 weeks of fully paid leave for primary caregivers. This applies to birth, adoption, or foster placement. Eligibility begins after 6 months of continuous employment.
exampleQuestions.vacationQ: How many vacation days do I get?
exampleQuestions.vacationA: Standard employees receive 25 days per calendar year, prorated based on start date. Up to 5 days can be carried over to the next year.
exampleQuestions.expenseQ: How do I submit an expense claim?
exampleQuestions.expenseA: Log into the expense portal with your company email and submit receipts by the 25th of each month for reimbursement in the next pay cycle.
exampleQuestions.notCoveredQ: What happens if my question is not covered in the handbook?
exampleQuestions.notCoveredA: Rudix will surface a low-confidence or not-found response and suggest contacting HR directly. Answer quality is tracked so coverage gaps can be addressed in the next policy update.
exampleQuestions.notCoveredCitation: No direct source — low confidence indicated

security.heading: Built for HR data sensitivity
security.description: HR documents contain sensitive employee information. Rudix is built with role-aware access, data governance, and clear boundaries between what Rudix answers and what your HR team owns.
security.encryptionFeature: End-to-end encryption at rest and in transit
security.roleAccessFeature: Role-scoped access — employees only see their content
security.auditLogFeature: Complete audit log for every query and document action
security.usageNote: Usage note: Rudix does not make employment decisions or legal determinations. Sensitive data governance remains with your organization.

cta.heading: Turn your HR documents into a policy assistant.
cta.description: Reduce repetitive HR queries and give employees consistent, source-grounded answers from day one.

hero.heading: Ask contracts and policies with source-backed answers.
hero.description: Search contracts, legal policies, vendor agreements, renewal terms, obligations, and deadlines with citations. Built for enterprise-grade compliance.
hero.primaryCta: Speak to us about legal workflows
hero.queryExample: "When is the termination notice for the AWS contract?"
hero.answerText: The AWS Master Service Agreement requires a 90-day written notice prior to the end of the current term for non-renewal.

problems.heading: Contracts are too important to search manually.
problems.description: Manual legal reviews slow down deals and increase operational risk. Rudix eliminates the friction.
problems.longContractsBody: Navigating 100+ page agreements to find a single liability sub-clause takes hours of expensive legal time.
problems.repeatedQuestionsBody: Sales and procurement teams ask the same Standard Terms questions daily, clogging legal support queues.
problems.missedDeadlinesBody: Auto-renewal dates buried in legacy PDFs are easily missed, leading to unwanted multi-year commitments.

documentSources.heading: Built for every legal asset.
documentSources.description: Rudix supports complex document hierarchies and cross-references between master agreements and local statements of work.
documentSources.ingestionDesc: Secure, encrypted processing of all legal formats.

questions.heading: Ask your data anything.
questions.description: From simple lookups to complex risk analysis, Rudix provides instant clarity.
questions.q1: What is the termination notice period?
questions.q3: Is there a limitation of liability clause?

citations.heading: Trust the source.
citations.description: Every answer from Rudix includes specific source snippets, document names, and page numbers. We never hallucinate terms — we only retrieve facts.
citations.deepLinkingDetail: Click a citation to jump directly to the paragraph in the original document.
citations.auditTrailsDetail: Full history of who asked what and which documents were referenced.
citations.accessControlsDetail: Role-scoped workspaces keep privileged documents separate.
citations.responsibleUseText: Rudix supports legal research and document workflows. It does not replace attorney review or constitute legal advice. All retrieved information should be verified by qualified legal counsel before reliance.

cta.heading: Find contract answers faster.
cta.description: Join top legal teams using Rudix to automate contract intelligence and reduce legal risk.

hero.heading: Find audit evidence faster.
hero.description: Use Rudix to retrieve cited answers from policies, procedures, security documents, audit evidence, and compliance files.

problems.heading: Audit evidence is difficult to find when it is spread across files.
problems.description: Manual collection drains resources and risks non-compliance. Rudix centralizes the discovery process with precision.
problems.evidenceFragBody: Scattered documentation across disparate cloud drives, emails, and local servers makes comprehensive audits nearly impossible to manage.
problems.traceabilityBody: Policy answers frequently lack direct links to original source documents, leaving compliance officers to manually re-verify every claim.
problems.manualDrainBody: Auditors spend 60% of their time collecting evidence instead of analyzing it. Manual retrieval is slow, error-prone, and expensive.

documentSources.heading: Upload everything. Find anything.
documentSources.description: Rudix ingests your entire compliance ecosystem, maintaining full context and structural integrity across diverse file formats.

examples.heading: Interrogate your evidence.
examples.description: Ask natural language questions and get cited answers instantly from your compliance library.
examples.retentionQ: Where is the data retention policy?
examples.retentionA: Rudix identifies specific paragraphs in Global_Privacy_v4.pdf and cross-references internal SOPs.
examples.accessReviewsA: Instantly pulls Q1–Q4 log exports and the IAM approval procedure cited in your latest audit plan.
examples.encryptionA: Scans all security controls and highlights ISO 27001 Annex A clauses mapped to internal technical standards.

trust.heading: Built for enterprise-grade trust.
trust.description: Compliance isn't just about finding data — it's about verifying it securely and maintaining a perfect trail.
trust.auditRefsBody: Every answer includes deep-links to the exact page and paragraph of the source document.
trust.permFilterBody: Users can only retrieve information from documents they are explicitly authorized to view in your IAM system.
trust.activityLogsBody: Complete immutable history of every query, response, and document access for internal governance.
trust.disclaimerText: Rudix supports evidence discovery and policy research. It does not issue certifications or replace auditor review. All retrieved evidence should be validated by your compliance team before submission to any regulatory body.

cta.heading: Make compliance evidence easier to find.
cta.description: Join forward-thinking enterprise teams who have cut their audit preparation time with Rudix high-fidelity retrieval.

hero.heading: Win deals with cited product intelligence.
hero.description: Empower your AEs and SEs to answer complex technical questions instantly. Rudix indexes your entire knowledge base to provide cited, accurate sales intelligence in real-time.

problems.heading: The Cost of Sales Friction
problems.description: Searching for the right collateral shouldn't be the bottleneck in your deal cycle.
problems.lostCaseStudiesBody: Your best healthcare success story is buried in a 2022 Slack thread. AEs waste 4 hours weekly searching for relevant proof points.
problems.outdatedPricingBody: Reps pitching legacy pricing sheets leads to massive contract friction and margin erosion during closing stages.
problems.battlecardFrictionBody: Competitor FUD changes weekly. Without instant access to tactical counters, your team loses momentum in head-to-head evals.

documentSources.heading: Your knowledge, unified.
documentSources.description: Rudix indexes and structures data from all the places your sales collateral lives:

queries.heading: Ask anything. Get the answer.
queries.description: No more manual scrolling. Your team asks questions in plain English and gets verified responses with direct links to the source.
queries.q1: "Which case study fits a healthcare prospect looking for SOC2 compliance?"
queries.q2: "What are our competitive advantages against Enterprise-X?"
queries.q2Answer: "Based on the 'Q3 Battlecard', our advantages are (1) Native VPC deployment and (2) No-PII data handling…"
queries.q3: "Can we offer a 15% discount for a 3-year term on the Enterprise tier?"

profile.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently remove your account and associated data.

appShell.searchAriaLabel: Search across pages, documents, and chats
appShell.quickNavHint: Quick navigation and organization-scoped search. Use {shortcut} anytime.
appShell.noResults: No matching results. Try a filename, status, chat title, or page name.
appShell.noDocumentsOrChats: No recent documents or chats yet. Upload a document or ask your first question.
appShell.loadingSessionDescription: Checking your account and organization access for this workspace.

errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
errors.forbiddenDescription: You don't have permission to access this page.
errors.serverErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.retryFailed: Retry failed. Please try again later.
errors.configIncompleteDescription: Required public environment values are missing or invalid. Update your frontend environment file and restart the app.

toasts.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
